sections.title: Sovereignty
sections.simplified: All power belongs to you, the citizens.

sections.title: Supremacy
sections.simplified: The Constitution is the highest law.

sections.title: Defense
sections.simplified: Every person has a duty to defend the Constitution.

sections.title: The Republic
sections.simplified: Kenya is a sovereign, democratic Republic.

sections.title: Devolution
sections.simplified: Government is decentralized into 47 counties.

sections.title: Languages
sections.simplified: National: Kiswahili. Official: Kiswahili & English.

sections.title: Religion
sections.simplified: There is no state religion in Kenya.

sections.title: Symbols
sections.simplified: Flag, Anthem, Emblem and Seal.

sections.title: Values
sections.simplified: The Rule of Law and Social Justice.

sections.title: Entitlements
sections.simplified: Rights to Passport and ID.

sections.title: Birth
sections.simplified: Citizen if a parent was Kenyan at birth.

sections.title: Registration
sections.simplified: Applying for citizenship after marriage (7 yrs).

sections.title: Dual
sections.simplified: Dual citizenship for Kenyans by birth.

sections.title: Basis
sections.simplified: Rights protect your dignity.

sections.title: Duty
sections.simplified: State must fulfill rights.

sections.title: Limits
sections.simplified: Rights limited only by law.

sections.title: Life
sections.simplified: Right to life.

sections.title: Equality
sections.simplified: No discrimination.

sections.title: Dignity
sections.simplified: Human dignity.

sections.title: Freedom & Security
sections.simplified: Freedom from torture and arbitrary arrest.

sections.title: Slavery
sections.simplified: No person is held in slavery.

sections.title: Privacy
sections.simplified: Right to privacy.

sections.title: Religion
sections.simplified: Freedom of conscience and belief.

sections.title: Speech
sections.simplified: Freedom of expression.

sections.title: Media
sections.simplified: Media freedom is guaranteed by the State.

sections.title: Info
sections.simplified: Access to gov data.

sections.title: Association
sections.simplified: Right to form and join groups.

sections.title: Protest
sections.simplified: Peaceful assembly.

sections.title: Politics
sections.simplified: Right to vote.

sections.title: Movement
sections.simplified: Move and live anywhere in Kenya.

sections.title: Property
sections.simplified: Acquire and own land and property.

sections.title: Labor
sections.simplified: Fair labor practices and trade unions.

sections.title: Environment
sections.simplified: Clean and healthy environment.

sections.title: Social
sections.simplified: Health, housing, food, water, education.

sections.title: Language
sections.simplified: Use your language and culture.

sections.title: Family
sections.simplified: Family is the fundamental unit of society.

sections.title: Consumer
sections.simplified: Protection from poor goods and services.

sections.title: Fair Administration
sections.simplified: Efficient and lawful government service.

sections.title: Access to Justice
sections.simplified: Access to justice for all.

sections.title: Arrested Persons
sections.simplified: Right to remain silent and see a lawyer.

sections.title: Fair Hearing
sections.simplified: Fair and public trial.

sections.title: Detained Persons
sections.simplified: Rights while imprisoned.

sections.title: Children
sections.simplified: Basic education and shelter for children.

sections.title: Disability
sections.simplified: Dignity and access for people with disabilities.

sections.title: Youth
sections.simplified: Jobs and education for the youth.

sections.title: Minorities
sections.simplified: Participation of marginalized groups.

sections.title: Elderly
sections.simplified: Care/Dignity.

sections.title: Land
sections.simplified: Equitable land use.

sections.title: Classes
sections.simplified: Public/Community/Private.

sections.title: Nature
sections.simplified: Protect biodiversity.

sections.title: Service
sections.simplified: Serve people, not self.

sections.title: Conduct
sections.simplified: Role model behavior.

sections.title: Voters
sections.simplified: Free and fair.

sections.title: IEBC
sections.simplified: Election Commission.

sections.title: Bunge
sections.simplified: Parliament makes laws.

sections.title: National Assembly
sections.simplified: Represents people in constituencies and oversees national revenue.

sections.title: Senate
sections.simplified: Represents the counties and protects their interests.

sections.title: Public
sections.simplified: Public participation.

sections.title: Petitions
sections.simplified: Right to petition Parliament to consider any matter within its authority.

sections.title: Power
sections.simplified: Executive authority is exercised for the service of the people.

sections.title: President
sections.simplified: The President is the symbol of national unity and Head of State.

sections.title: Term Limits
sections.simplified: The President shall hold office for a term of five years, max two terms.
sections.swSimplified: Muda wa kipindi cha urais ni miaka mitano.

sections.title: Immunity
sections.simplified: President cannot be sued in court during their term of office.
sections.swSimplified: Kinga ya kisheria kwa rais aliyeko kazini.

sections.title: Courts
sections.simplified: Justice shall be done to all and not delayed.

sections.title: Supreme
sections.simplified: Highest court in Kenya, final arbiter of law.

sections.title: High Court
sections.simplified: Has the power to decide if any law is unconstitutional.
sections.swSimplified: Mahakama Kuu yenye mamlaka ya kikatiba.

sections.title: JSC
sections.simplified: Judicial Service Commission manages judges and courts.

sections.title: Devolve
sections.simplified: Aims to promote democracy and accountable power.

sections.title: County Executive
sections.simplified: Led by the Governor and the deputy governor.

sections.title: Governor
sections.simplified: Elected directly by county voters for 5 years.

sections.title: Powers
sections.simplified: Division of functions between national and county governments.

sections.title: Taxes
sections.simplified: Burden of taxation shared fairly across generations.

sections.title: Revenue Sharing
sections.simplified: At least 15% of national revenue must go to counties.

sections.title: Borrowing
sections.simplified: County government may borrow only if the national government guarantees it.

sections.title: Jobs
sections.simplified: Civic ethics.

sections.title: Police
sections.simplified: Protect life.

sections.title: IEBC/ETC
sections.simplified: Independent oversight.

sections.title: Amend
sections.simplified: Changing the law.

sections.title: Rules
sections.simplified: General provisions.

sections.title: History
sections.simplified: Transition 2010.
